Package neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem

Class S001SecondaryPressureProtectionResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem.S001SecondaryPressureProtectionResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class S001SecondaryPressureProtectionResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from NORSOK S-001 Clause 10.4.7 secondary pressure protection screening.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Constructor Details

    • S001SecondaryPressureProtectionResult

      public S001SecondaryPressureProtectionResult(double maximumEventPressureBara, double designPressureBara, double testPressureBara, double demandFrequencyPerYear, double targetFrequencyPerYear, boolean pressureBasisComplete, boolean testPressureValid, boolean pressureWithinTestPressure, boolean frequencyConfigured, boolean frequencyCriterionMet, boolean leakageAssessed, boolean leakageRoutedSafe, boolean proofTestConfigured, boolean proofTestCriterionMet, boolean acceptable)
      Creates a secondary pressure protection result.
      Parameters:
      maximumEventPressureBara - maximum event pressure in bara
      designPressureBara - design pressure in bara
      testPressureBara - pressure test pressure in bara
      demandFrequencyPerYear - demand frequency per year
      targetFrequencyPerYear - target frequency per year
      pressureBasisComplete - true when pressure basis is complete
      testPressureValid - true when test pressure is at least design pressure
      pressureWithinTestPressure - true when event pressure is no higher than test pressure
      frequencyConfigured - true when demand and target frequencies are configured
      frequencyCriterionMet - true when demand frequency is at or below target
      leakageAssessed - true when leakage has been assessed
      leakageRoutedSafe - true when leakage is routed to a safe location
      proofTestConfigured - true when proof-test interval is configured
      proofTestCriterionMet - true when proof-test interval is acceptable
      acceptable - true when all configured criteria are acceptable

  • Method Details

    • isPressureBasisComplete

      public boolean isPressureBasisComplete()
      Tests whether pressure basis is complete.
      Returns:
      true when event, design, and test pressure were supplied

    • isPressureWithinTestPressure

      public boolean isPressureWithinTestPressure()
      Tests whether event pressure is within test pressure.
      Returns:
      true when event pressure is no higher than test pressure

    • isFrequencyConfigured

      public boolean isFrequencyConfigured()
      Tests whether frequency criterion is configured.
      Returns:
      true when frequency comparison can be made

    • isFrequencyCriterionMet

      public boolean isFrequencyCriterionMet()
      Tests whether frequency criterion is met.
      Returns:
      true when demand frequency is at or below target

    • isLeakageBasisAcceptable

      public boolean isLeakageBasisAcceptable()
      Tests whether leakage basis is acceptable.
      Returns:
      true when leakage is assessed and routed to a safe location

    • isProofTestCriterionMet

      public boolean isProofTestCriterionMet()
      Tests whether proof-test criterion is met.
      Returns:
      true when proof-test criterion is met or not configured

    • isAcceptable

      public boolean isAcceptable()
      Tests whether the secondary pressure protection is acceptable.
      Returns:
      true when all screening criteria are acceptable

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts the result to an ordered map.
      Returns:
      ordered map for reporting

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Converts the result to pretty JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the result
